2026-04-09T07:12:58.3318462Z - 🔍 rpc **safeoutputs**→`tools/call` `noop`
2026-04-09T07:12:58.3318907Z

2026-04-09T07:12:58.3321470Z   ```

Use this when you cannot accomplish what was requested because required data, context, or information is missing.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"alternatives":{"description":"Any workarounds, manual steps, or alternative approaches the user could take (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"context":{"description":"Additional context about the missing data or where it should come from (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"data_type":{"description":"Type or description of the missing data or information (max 128 characters). Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. The workflow framework will treat this as a failure signal even when the agent exits successfully.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"details":{"description":"Optional extended details or diagnostic context about the failure (max 65000 characters).","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"A concise explanation of why the task could not be completed (max 1024 characters). 2026-04-09T07:12:58.4023753Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-09T07:11:06.229566857Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":"57981","method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-09T07:12:58.4036183Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-09T07:11:06.450824559Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57981,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] Flattened properties should skip [CodeGenSuppress]-ed members from child models\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nWhen a model has `@@Legacy.flattenProperty` applied and one of the flattened child model\\u0026#39;s properties is suppressed via `[CodeGenSuppress]` and re-declared with `[Obsolete]` in custom code, the generated parent model\\u0026#39;s flattened properties still reference the `[Obsolete]` members, causing CS0618 errors.\\n\\n## Steps to Reproduce\\n\\n**TypeSpec models:**\\n```typespec\\nmodel Step {\\n  startTimeUtc?: utcDateTime;\\n  endTimeUtc?: utcDateTime;\\n  name?: string;\\n}\\n\\nmodel UpdateRunProperties {\\n  progress?: Step;\\n}\\n\\n// in back-compatible.tsp:\\n@@Legacy.flattenProperty(UpdateRunProperties.progress);\\n```\\n\\n**Custom code (HciUpdateStep.cs):**\\n```csharp\\n[CodeGenSuppress(\\u0026#34;StartTimeUtc\\u0026#34;)]\\n[CodeGenSuppress(\\u0026#34;EndTimeUtc\\u0026#34;)]\\npublic partial class HciUpdateStep\\n{\\n    // New preferred name\\n    public DateTimeOffset? StartOn { get; set; }\\n    public DateTimeOffset? EndOn { get; set; }\\n\\n    // Old name kept for backward compat\\n    [Obsolete(\\u0026#34;Use StartOn instead.\\u0026#34;)]\\n    [EditorBrowsable(EditorBrowsableState.Never)]\\n    public DateTimeOffset? StartTimeUtc { get =\\u0026gt; StartOn; set =\\u0026gt; StartOn = value; }\\n\\n    [Obsolete(\\u0026#34;Use EndOn instead.\\u0026#34;)]\\n    [EditorBrowsable(EditorBrowsableState.Never)]\\n    public DateTimeOffset? EndTimeUtc { get =\\u0026gt; EndOn; set =\\u0026gt; EndOn = value; }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## Expected Behavior\\n\\nThe generated `UpdateRunProperties` should skip the suppressed/obsolete properties (`StartTimeUtc`, `EndTimeUtc`) when flattening `Step` via `progress`, since they are `[CodeGenSuppress]`-ed on the child model. It should only flatten the non-suppressed properties.\\n\\n## Actual Behavior\\n\\nThe generated `UpdateRunProperties` still produces flattened properties that reference the `[Obsolete]` members:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Generated UpdateRunProperties.cs\\npublic DateTimeOffset? StartTimeUtc\\n{\\n    get =\\u0026gt; Progress is null ? default : Progress.StartTimeUtc;  // CS0618: StartTimeUtc is obsolete\\n    set { Progress.StartTimeUtc = value.Value; }                // CS0618\\n}\\n```\\n\\nThis causes CS0618 errors that require project-level `CS0618`.\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nThis occurs in the Azure.ResourceManager.Hci TypeSpec migration (PR: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/56586). The `Step` model (renamed to `HciUpdateStep`) has properties `startTimeUtc`/`endTimeUtc`/`lastUpdatedTimeUtc` that were renamed to `StartOn`/`EndOn`/`LastUpdatedOn` via `[CodeGenSuppress]` + custom re-declaration. The old names are kept with `[Obsolete]` for GA backward compat. But `@@Legacy.flattenProperty(UpdateRunProperties.progress)` still flattens the obsolete properties onto `UpdateRunProperties`.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57981\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"live1206\",\"id\":5196139,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/live1206\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5196139?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-09T07:08:15Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-09T07:08:15Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

EndOn { get; set; }\\n\\n    // Old name kept for backward compat\\n    [Obsolete(\\u0026#34;Use StartOn instead.\\u0026#34;)]\\n    [EditorBrowsable(EditorBrowsableState.Never)]\\n    public DateTimeOffset? StartTimeUtc\\n{\\n    get =\\u0026gt; Progress is null ? default : Progress.StartTimeUtc;  // CS0618: StartTimeUtc is obsolete\\n    set { Progress.StartTimeUtc = value.Value; }                // CS0618\\n}\\n```\\n\\nThis causes CS0618 errors that require project-level `CS0618`.\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nThis occurs in the Azure.ResourceManager.Hci TypeSpec migration (PR: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/56586).
